Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 The category of partial setoids

 Given a hyperdoctrine `H`, we can define the type of partial setoids in `H`. Concretely,
 a partial setoid is a type `X` in `H` together with a partial equvialence relation (i.e.,
 a formula on `X ×h X` that is symmetric and transitive). We also defined the notion of a
 morphism between partial setoids: morphisms from a partial setoid `X` to a partial setoid
 `Y` are given by relations on `X` and `Y` satisfying some properties (which are described
 in the file `PerMorphisms.v`). In this file, we show how partial setoids together with
 partial setoid morphisms form a category. To do so, we define the identity partial setoid
 morphism and the composition, and we show that the category laws are satisfied.

 Note that the category of partial setoids is the basis for the tripos-to-topos construction.
 If one looks at triposes, then the category of partial setoids actually is a topos.
 However, even if one only looks at first-order hyperdoctrines, then this category still
 has a lot of structure. For instance, it has all finite limits.

 The most interesting aspect of this construction is that in general this does not give
 rise to a univalent category. For instance, on the category of sets we can define the
 trivial hyperdoctrine, whose formulas in context `Γ` are given by inhabitants of the unit
 type. In this case, partial setoids are the same as sets: this is because every set has
 a unique partial equivalence relation in this hyperdoctrine since there is only one
 formula. However, there also always is a unique morphism between any two partial setoids.
 For that reason, the resulting category is not univalent. For this reason, if one wants
 a tripos-to-univalent-topos construction, then one needs to apply the Rezk completion
 to the category of partial setoids. This works well due to the universal property of the
 tripos-to-topos construction (see Theorem 3.6 in "Tripos Theory in Retrospect" by Andrew
 Pitts).

 References
 - "Tripos Theory in Retrospect" by Andrew Pitts

 Content
 1. The identity morphism
 2. The composition of morphisms of partial setoids
 3. The category of partial setoids

 ******************************************************************************************)

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERs.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMorphisms.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope hd.

(** * 1. The identity morphism *)
Definition id_partial_setoid_morphism_form
           {H : first_order_hyperdoctrine}
           (X : partial_setoid H)
  : form (X ×h X)
  := π₁ (tm_var _) ~ π₂ (tm_var _).

Arguments id_partial_setoid_morphism_form {H} X /.


H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X)

X: partial_setoid H
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X)
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))))

T:= X: partial_setoid H

⊢ ∀h (∀h ((id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X)
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),

          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))))

⊤

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

    exact (partial_setoid_refl_l (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ~ x₂
                  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂

                           X) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]))))

(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂)
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

        use hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))))

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

T:= X: partial_setoid H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X)
              [⟨ π₂

                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
               ⟩]

                [⟨ π₂

                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))))

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x ~ x
⊢ (x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm ~ y)
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h X), x ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
T:= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x ~ x
⊢ (x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h X), x ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
T:= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x ~ x ⊢ x ~ x

      use hyperdoctrine_hyp.
Qed.


H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
partial_setoid_morphism X X


H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
partial_setoid_morphism X X

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
form (X ×h X)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ?φ

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
form (X ×h X)
 exact (id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism_form X)
 exact (id_partial_setoid_morphism_laws X).
Defined.

(** * 2. The composition of morphisms of partial setoids *)
Section CompPartialSetoidMorphism.
  Context {H : first_order_hyperdoctrine}
          {X Y Z : partial_setoid H}
          (φ₁ : partial_setoid_morphism X Y)
          (φ₂ : partial_setoid_morphism Y Z).

  Definition partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
    : form (X ×h Z)
    := let x := π₁ (π₁ (tm_var _)) : tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) X in
       let y := π₂ (tm_var _) : tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Y in
       let z := π₂ (π₁ (tm_var _)) : tm ((X ×h Z) ×h Y) Z in
       (∃h (φ₁ [ ⟨ x , y ⟩ ] ∧ φ₂ [ ⟨ y , z ⟩ ])).

  Arguments partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form /.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined_law
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined_law
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_mor_eq_defined_law
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined_law
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T'))): tm ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T') T
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T'))): tm ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T') T
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T')): tm ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T') T'
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form [⟨ x, z ⟩]
          ⇒ x ~ x))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((∃h (φ₁
               [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
               ∧ φ₂
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
          [⟨ x, z ⟩] ⇒ x ~ x))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∃h (φ₁
              [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
              ∧ φ₂
                [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                 z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm ⟩]) ⇒ x ~ x))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∃h (φ₁
              [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
              ∧ φ₂
                [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                 z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm ⟩]) ⇒ x ~ x))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∃h (φ₁
              [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm, y ⟩]
              ∧ φ₂
                [⟨ y,
                 z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm ⟩]) ⇒ x ~ x))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ ∀h (∃h (φ₁
          [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           y ⟩]
          ∧ φ₂
            [⟨ y,
             z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm
             ⟩]) ⇒ x ~ x)

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))]
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y
       ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂
        [⟨ y,
         z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])
  ⇒ x ~ x

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))]
∧ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y
       ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂
        [⟨ y,
         z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])
⊢ x ~ x

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
∃h (φ₁
    [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
    ∧ φ₂
      [⟨ y, z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm
       ⟩]) ⊢ x ~ x

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
(∃h (φ₁
     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
     ∧ φ₂
       [⟨ y, z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm
        ⟩])) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ y, z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (x ~ x) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y, z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (x ~ x) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y, z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
   (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))))

φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((∃h (φ₁
               [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
               ∧ φ₂
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
          [⟨ x, z ⟩] ⇒ z ~ z))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

T':= Z: partial_setoid H

⊢ ∀h (∀h (∃h (φ₁
              [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
              ∧ φ₂
                [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                 z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm ⟩]) ⇒ z ~ z))

              [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,

φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y

              [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                 ]tm, y ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ ∀h (∃h (φ₁
          [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           y ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))]
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y
       ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂
        [⟨ y,
         z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])
  ⇒ z ~ z

(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))]

      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
(∃h (φ₁
     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
     ∧ φ₂
       [⟨ y, z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm
        ⟩])) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ y, z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (z ~ z) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y, z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (z ~ z) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y, z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  z [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
   (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm

  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)),

⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Y)))

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z)
                                 ×h Z))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z)
                              ×h Z))))
                  ⇒ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z)
                             ×h Z))) ~
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))
                    ⇒ partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
                      [⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((𝟙 ×h X)
                                          ×h X) ×h Z)
                                        ×h Z))))),
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var

T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X

z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z

                  ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂
                    ⇒ partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form

                      ⇒ partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ~ x₂
                  ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂
                    ⇒ (∃h (φ₁
                           [⟨ π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                            π₂
                              (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))
                            ⟩]
                           ∧ φ₂
                             [⟨ π₂
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                              π₂
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                              ⟩])) [⟨ x₁, z₁ ⟩]
                      ⇒ (∃h (φ₁
                             [⟨ π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                              π₂
                                (tm_var
                                   ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
                             ∧ φ₂
                               [⟨ π₂
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                                π₂
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                                ⟩])) [⟨ x₂, z₂ ⟩]))))

φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H

                  ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂
                    ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
                          [⟨ x₁
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                      ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                           ⟩]
                          ∧ φ₂
                            [⟨ π₂
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                       ×h Z) ×h Z)
                                     ×h Y)),
                             z₁
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                      ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                             ]tm ⟩])
                      ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
                            [⟨ x₂
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h Z) ×h Z)
                                      ×h Y)) ]tm,
                             π₂
                               (tm_var
                                  (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                     ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                             ⟩]
                            ∧ φ₂
                              [⟨ π₂
                                   (tm_var
                                      (((((𝟙 ×h X)
                                          ×h X) ×h Z)
                                        ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                               z₂
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h Z) ×h Z)
                                      ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])))))

                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                           ⟩]
                          ∧ φ₂
                            [⟨ π₂
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                       ×h Z) ×h Z)
                                     ×h Y)),
                             z₁
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                      ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                             ]tm ⟩])
                      ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
                            [⟨ x₂
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h Z) ×h Z)
                                      ×h Y)) ]tm,
                             π₂
                               (tm_var
                                  (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                     ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                             ⟩]
                            ∧ φ₂
                              [⟨ π₂
                                   (tm_var
                                      (((((𝟙 ×h X)
                                          ×h X) ×h Z)
                                        ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                               z₂
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h Z) ×h Z)
                                      ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ~ x₂
                  ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂
                    ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
                          [⟨ x₁
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                      ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                             ]tm, y ⟩]
                          ∧ φ₂
                            [⟨ y,
                             z₁
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                      ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                             ]tm ⟩])
                      ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
                            [⟨ x₂
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h Z) ×h Z)
                                      ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
                            ∧ φ₂
                              [⟨ y,
                               z₂
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h Z) ×h Z)
                                      ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))]
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
  ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂
    ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
          [⟨ x₁
             [π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
             ]tm, y ⟩]
          ∧ φ₂
            [⟨ y,
             z₁
             [π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
             ]tm ⟩])
      ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
            [⟨ x₂
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                      ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
            ∧ φ₂
              [⟨ y,
               z₂
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                      ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])

φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

T':= Z: partial_setoid H

[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))] ∧ x₁ ~ x₂
⊢ z₁ ~ z₂
  ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
        [⟨ x₁
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

             ]tm, y ⟩]
          ∧ φ₂
            [⟨ y,
             z₂
             [π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
             ]tm ⟩])

        [⟨ x₁

              (tm_var

           z₁

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂)
∧ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x₁
         [π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm, y ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂
        [⟨ y,
         z₁
         [π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x₂
         [π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm, y ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂
        [⟨ y,
         z₂
         [π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm ⟩])

       [π₁

       ]tm ⟩]) ∧ x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂

      [⟨ x₂
         [π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm, y ⟩]

[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))]

  [⟨ x₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

          z₂
          [π₁
             (tm_var

  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))]

 [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))]
 ∧ (x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂)
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))])
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X

(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ z₁ ~ z₂)
[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ]tm, y ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ y,
     z₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ₁
       [⟨ x₂
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
          ]tm, y ⟩]
       ∧ φ₂
         [⟨ y,
          z₂
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))]

(x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
 ]tm ~
 x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
 ]tm
 ∧ z₁
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm ~
   z₂
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm)
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ]tm, y ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂

      [⟨ x₂

                   ×h Y))) ]tm,
       y
       [⟨ π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                   ×h Y))),
        π₂
          (tm_var
             ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)

                  ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,

(x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
 ]tm ~
 x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
 ]tm
 ∧ z₁
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm ~
   z₂
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm)
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

   [⟨ x₂

         (π₁

               ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                ×h Y))) ]tm,
    y
    [⟨ π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                ×h Y))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ⟩ ]tm ⟩]

     [⟨ y

                ×h Y))) ]tm ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm ⟩]

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

T':= Z: partial_setoid H

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
 ]tm ~
 x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
 ]tm
 ∧ z₁
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm ~
   z₂
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm)
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ]tm, y ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ y,
     z₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ]tm ⟩]
⊢ φ₁
  [⟨ x₂
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ]tm,
   y
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
   ]tm ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ (π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
  ]tm ~
  (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
  ]tm
⊢ φ₁
  [⟨ (π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ]tm,
   (π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
   ]tm ⟩]

φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

              (π₁
                 (tm_var

                     ×h Y)))))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁

  [⟨ π₂

   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]

                    (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                     ×h Y)))))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))))
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                     ×h Y)))))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))))
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                     ×h Y)))))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))))
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                     ×h Y)))))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

             exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined φ₁ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
 ]tm ~
 x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
 ]tm
 ∧ z₁
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm ~
   z₂
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm)
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ]tm, y ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ y,
     z₁
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ]tm ⟩]
⊢ φ₂
  [⟨ y
     [⟨ π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
      ⟩ ]tm,
   z₂
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
]tm ~
x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
]tm
∧ z₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
  ]tm ~
  z₂ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
  ]tm
  ∧ φ₁
    [⟨ x₁
       [π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
       ]tm, y ⟩]
    ∧ φ₂
      [⟨ y,
       z₁
       [π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
       ]tm ⟩]
⊢ φ₂
  [⟨ y
     [⟨ π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
      ⟩ ]tm,
   z₂
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm ⟩]

z₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

   ]tm ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₂
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
 (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm
 ⟩]
∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
  ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
  ]tm
⊢ φ₂
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
     [⟨ π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
      ⟩ ]tm,
   (π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
   ]tm ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₂
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
 π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))))
 ⟩]
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
⊢ φ₂
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
   π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
   ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
φ₂
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
 π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))))
 ⟩]
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

  (π₁

x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X

 π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))))
 ⟩]
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))

 ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ~

[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
 π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))))
 ⟩]
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))

    (π₁
       (π₁

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) Y
π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))))

               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
              [⟨ x, z₁ ⟩]
              ⇒ partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
                [⟨ x, z₂ ⟩] ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((∃h (φ₁
                   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
                   ∧ φ₂
                     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                      ⟩])) [⟨ x, z₁ ⟩]
              ⇒ (∃h (φ₁
                     [⟨ π₁
                          (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
                     ∧ φ₂
                       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                        π₂
                          (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                        ⟩])) [⟨ x, z₂ ⟩] ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∃h (φ₁
                  [⟨ x
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                   ⟩]
                  ∧ φ₂
                    [⟨ π₂
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                             ×h Y)),
                     z₁
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])
              ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
                    [⟨ x
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                              ×h Y)) ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
                     ⟩]
                    ∧ φ₂
                      [⟨ π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                               ×h Y)),
                       z₂
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)
                              ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]) ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))]
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
         z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm ⟩])
  ⇒ ∃h (φ₁
        [⟨ x
           [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ φ₂
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
           z₂
           [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
           ]tm ⟩]) ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X

((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))]
∧ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂

         z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂

         z₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
         ]tm ⟩]) ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H

∃h (φ₁
    [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
     ⟩]
    ∧ φ₂

       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]

         ]tm ⟩]) ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z

(∃h (φ₁
     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
      ⟩]
     ∧ φ₂
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
        z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
        ]tm ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
     z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm
     ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ₁
       [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ₂
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
          z₂
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
          ]tm ⟩]) ⇒ z₁ ~ z₂)
  [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H

[⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]

  [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
φ₁
[⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
   z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         ]tm,
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
         z₂
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         ]tm ⟩])
  ⇒ z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
    z₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
(φ₁
 [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ φ₂
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
    z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm
    ⟩])
∧ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         ]tm,
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
         z₂
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         ]tm ⟩])
⊢ z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  z₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H

    [⟨ x

             (tm_var

       ]tm ⟩])
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
     z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm
     ⟩]
⊢ z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  z₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) X
z₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
z₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) Z
(∃h (φ₁
     [⟨ x
        [π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
        ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))
      ⟩]
     ∧ φ₂
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
        z₂
        [π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
        ]tm ⟩])
 ∧ φ₁
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ φ₂
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
      z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))
      ]tm ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x
     [π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
     z₂
     [π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     ]tm ⟩]
⊢ (z₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
   z₂ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ]tm)
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y))

    ∧ φ₂
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)),

  [⟨ x

  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

 [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))))

    ]tm ⟩])
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))))
     [π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     ]tm,

  ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z)))
  [π₁

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y':= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
(φ₁ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y, z₁ ⟩])
∧ φ₁ [⟨ x, y' ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y', z₂ ⟩] ⊢ z₁ ~ z₂

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y':= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
(φ₁ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y, z₁ ⟩])
∧ φ₁ [⟨ x, y' ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y', z₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ₂ [⟨ ?x, z₁ ⟩]

y':= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
φ₂ [⟨ y, z₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ₂ [⟨ y, z₁ ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y':= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
(φ₁ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y, z₁ ⟩])
∧ φ₁ [⟨ x, y' ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y', z₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ₂ [⟨ y, z₂ ⟩]

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
 exact y'.

              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (π₁

           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z

tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y':= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
(φ₁ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y, z₁ ⟩])
∧ φ₁ [⟨ x, y' ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y', z₂ ⟩] ⊢ z₂ ~ z₂

           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y':= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
(φ₁ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y, z₁ ⟩])
∧ φ₁ [⟨ x, y' ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ y', z₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ₂ [⟨ y', z₂ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
T:= X: partial_setoid H
T':= Z: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂
  (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y':= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
z₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
z₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
φ₂ [⟨ y', z₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ₂ [⟨ y', z₂ ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
      ⇒ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
      ⇒ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
