φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
      ⇒ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
⊤
⊢ ∀h (x ~ x
      ⇒ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
            [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ x ~ x
  ⇒ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))] ∧ x ~ x
⊢ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
x ~ x
⊢ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
(x ~ x) [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
       [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

[⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
       [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩]))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩] ⊢ ?φ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩] ∧ ?φ
⊢ (∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
       [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
form ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)
 exact (y ~ y).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y
 exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined φ₁ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩] ∧ y ~ y
⊢ (∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
       [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ₁ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
 ∧ y ~ y) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ ((∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩]))
   [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ₁
 [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm]
 ∧ (y ~ y) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))])
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩
       [⟨ ((π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm)
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩
       ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₂
[⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm]
  ∧ (y ~ y) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))]
⊢ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩
       [⟨ ((π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm)
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩
       ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ₂
 [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
 ∧ φ₁
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm])
∧ (y ~ y) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))]
⊢ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩
       [⟨ ((π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm)
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩
       ]tm])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X

 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm]

  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,

⊢ ∃h (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩
       [⟨ ((π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm)
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩
       ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) Z
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩
    [⟨ ((π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm)
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z), ?t ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) Z
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩
    [⟨ ((π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm)
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ ((∃h (φ₁
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ φ₂
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)) ]tm, z ⟩
    [⟨ ((π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm)
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Z)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))) ]tm,
 y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ x
         [π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y))))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ₂
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
         z
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)))),
          π₂
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
          ⟩ ]tm ⟩])

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) Y
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))) ]tm,
 y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ (φ₁
   [⟨ x
      [π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y))))
      ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ φ₂
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
      z
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
       ⟩ ]tm ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z), ?t ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) Y
 exact (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var _))).
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))) ]tm,
 y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ y [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ (φ₁
   [⟨ x
      [π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y))))
      ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ φ₂
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
      z
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
       ⟩ ]tm ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
   [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))) ]tm,
 (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ (φ₁
   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
      [π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y))))
      ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ φ₂
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)),
      (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)))
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z) ×h Y)))
       ⟩ ]tm ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))) ⟩]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Z) Z
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ₁
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))) ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]
⊢ φ₁
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))) ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Z)) ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_morphism X Z

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_morphism X Z

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
form (X ×h Z)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ?φ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
form (X ×h Z)
 exact partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form
 exact partial_setoid_comp_morphism_laws.
  Defined.
End CompPartialSetoidMorphism.

Arguments partial_setoid_comp_morphism_form {H X Y Z} φ₁ φ₂ /.

(** * 3. The category of partial setoids *)
Section CategoryOfPartialSetoids.
  Context (H : first_order_hyperdoctrine).

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory_ob_mor

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory_ob_mor

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
UU
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
?ob → ?ob → UU

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
UU
 exact (partial_setoid H).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
partial_setoid H → partial_setoid H → UU
 exact (λ (X Y : partial_setoid H), partial_setoid_morphism X Y).
  Defined.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory_data

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory_data

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory_ob_mor
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ c : ?C, ?C ⟦ c, c ⟧
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ a b c : ?C, ?C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → ?C ⟦ b, c ⟧ → ?C ⟦ a, c ⟧

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory_ob_mor
 exact precategory_ob_mor_of_partial_setoids.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ c : precategory_ob_mor_of_partial_setoids,
precategory_ob_mor_of_partial_setoids ⟦ c, c ⟧
 exact id_partial_setoid_morphism.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ a b c : precategory_ob_mor_of_partial_setoids,
precategory_ob_mor_of_partial_setoids ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ precategory_ob_mor_of_partial_setoids ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → precategory_ob_mor_of_partial_setoids ⟦ a, c ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ _ f g, partial_setoid_comp_morphism f g).
  Defined.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
is_precategory precategory_data_of_partial_setoids

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
is_precategory precategory_data_of_partial_setoids

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (a b : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids)
(f : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ a, b ⟧),
identity a · f = f
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (a b : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids)
(f : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f · identity b = f
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (a b c d : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids)
(f : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · (g · h) = f · g · h

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (a b : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids)
(f : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ a, b ⟧),
identity a · f = f
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: precategory_data_of_partial_setoids
φ: precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ X, Y ⟧
identity X · φ = φ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]) ⊢ φ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]) ⊢ φ
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (a b : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids)
(f : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f · identity b = f
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: precategory_data_of_partial_setoids
φ: precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ X, Y ⟧
φ · identity Y = φ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]) ⊢ φ

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ

      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]) ⊢ φ

(∃h (φ

      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ φ [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) X

  [⟨ x, y' ⟩
   [⟨ tm_var (X ×h Y), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (y' ~ y)
    [⟨ tm_var (X ×h Y), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]

  ∧ y' [⟨ tm_var (X ×h Y), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (a b c d : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids)
(f : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · (g · h) = f · g · h
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: precategory_data_of_partial_setoids
φ₁: precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ W, X ⟧
φ₂: precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ X, Y ⟧
φ₃: precategory_data_of_partial_setoids ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
φ₁ · (φ₂ · φ₃) = φ₁ · φ₂ · φ₃

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
∃h (φ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ (∃h (φ₂
           [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
           ∧ φ₃
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((∃h (φ₁
           [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
           ∧ φ₂
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ₃
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩])
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
∃h ((∃h (φ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ₂
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ₃
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ (∃h (φ₂
             [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
              π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
             ∧ φ₃
               [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
∃h (φ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ (∃h (φ₂
           [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
           ∧ φ₃
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((∃h (φ₁
           [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
           ∧ φ₂
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ₃
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
(∃h (φ₁
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ (∃h (φ₂
            [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ∧ φ₃
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ (∃h (φ₂
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ₃
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((∃h (φ₁
            [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
            ∧ φ₂
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ₃
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
φ₁
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ (∃h (φ₂
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ₃
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((∃h (φ₁
            [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
            ∧ φ₂
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ₃
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
φ₁
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ ∃h (φ₂
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ φ₃
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ₁
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
           [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
               π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
               [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm)
              [π₁
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
            ⟩ ]tm]
          ∧ φ₂
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
             [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 ]tm)
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
              ⟩ ]tm])
      ∧ φ₃
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
∃h (φ₂
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ φ₃
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ₁
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
           [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
               π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
               [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm)
              [π₁
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
            ⟩ ]tm]
          ∧ φ₂
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
             [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 ]tm)
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
              ⟩ ]tm])
      ∧ φ₃
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
(∃h (φ₂
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ φ₃
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
 ∧ φ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ φ₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (∃h (∃h (φ₁
           [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
            [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
                [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                   [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                ]tm)
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
             ⟩ ]tm]
           ∧ φ₂
             [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
              [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                  π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ⟩ ]tm)
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
                 ]tm,
               π₂
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
               ⟩ ]tm])
       ∧ φ₃
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
             [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
(∃h (φ₂
     [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ φ₃
       [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
        ]tm])
 ∧ φ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm])
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ φ₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ₁
          [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
            [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),

                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                ]tm)
               [π₁
                  (tm_var

               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
             ⟩ ]tm)
           [⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
              ⟩

                 (tm_var
                    (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                     ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂

                 (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))
            ⟩ ]tm]
          ∧ φ₂
            [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),

              [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),

                  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ⟩ ]tm)
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
                 ]tm,
               π₂
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
               ⟩ ]tm)
             [⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
                  [π₁

                        ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂

                     ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩

                      (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                       ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂

      ∧ φ₃

          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩

             [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
∃h (φ₂
    [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ φ₃
      [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ]tm])
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
   [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ φ₃
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ₁
          [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
            [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),

                [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                   [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                ]tm)
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
             ⟩ ]tm)
           [⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
              ⟩
              [π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                     ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂
              (tm_var
                 (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))
            ⟩ ]tm]
          ∧ φ₂
            [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩

                  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ⟩ ]tm)
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
                 ]tm,
               π₂
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
               ⟩ ]tm)

                  [π₁
                     (tm_var

          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))

            ]tm,

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
φ₁
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
 [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ φ₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ₁
          [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
            [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
                [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                   [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                ]tm)
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
             ⟩ ]tm)
           [⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
              ⟩
              [π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                     ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂
              (tm_var
                 (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))
            ⟩ ]tm]
          ∧ φ₂
            [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
              [⟨ (⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
                  π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ⟩ ]tm)
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
                 ]tm,
               π₂
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
               ⟩ ]tm)
             [⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                       ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))
              ⟩ ]tm])
      ∧ φ₃
        [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)))
             [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))

            ]tm,

         ]tm])

φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
φ₁
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),

  ∧ φ₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ₁
          [⟨ π₁
               (π₁

                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((((...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y) ×h X)))))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))
           ⟩]

                 (tm_var

                      ×h X))) ⟩])
      ∧ φ₃
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
         ⟩])

W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
φ₁
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
∧ φ₂
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (∃h (φ₁
          [⟨ π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((((...) ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y) ×h X)))))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))
           ⟩]
          ∧ φ₂
            [⟨ π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                     ×h X)),
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                      ×h X))) ⟩])
      ∧ φ₃
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
         ⟩])

w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) W

         ]tm ⟩])
  ∧ φ₃
    [⟨ y, π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⟩]

φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) W

  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))), x ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) W

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]
⊢ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]
⊢ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]
⊢ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

⊢ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]
⊢ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) W
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ⊢ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
∃h ((∃h (φ₁
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ₂
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ₃
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ (∃h (φ₂
             [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
              π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
             ∧ φ₃
               [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
(∃h ((∃h (φ₁
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
          ∧ φ₂
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ φ₃
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))]
∧ (∃h (φ₁
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ₂
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ₁
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (∃h (φ₂
              [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
               π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
              ∧ φ₃
                [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
(∃h (φ₁
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ φ₂
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ φ₃
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ₁
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (∃h (φ₂
              [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
               π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩]
              ∧ φ₃
                [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
∃h (φ₁
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ φ₂
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ φ₃
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (φ₂
            [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
             [⟨ (⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
                 [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
                 ]tm)
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩ ]tm]
            ∧ φ₃
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
               [⟨ (⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
                   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
                   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                      ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                    ⟩ ]tm)
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm]))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
(∃h (φ₁
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ φ₂
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
 ∧ φ₃
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (∃h (φ₁
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
       ∧ ∃h (φ₂
             [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
              π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
              [⟨ (⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
                  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                   ⟩ ]tm)
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ⟩ ]tm]
             ∧ φ₃
               [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
                [⟨ (⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
                    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
                    [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                     ⟩ ]tm)
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var
                      ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                ]tm])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
(∃h (φ₁
     [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm)
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ φ₂
       [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm)
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
        ]tm])
 ∧ φ₃
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm])
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),

    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),

        [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,

⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),

          ]tm,

       ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (φ₂
            [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
              π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
              [⟨ (⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),

                  [π₁

                  ]tm,

                [π₁

                       ×h Y)) ]tm,

                             (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                       ]tm,

                     ⟩ ]tm)
                   [π₁

                   ]tm,
                 π₂

                      ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                ]tm)
               [⟨ ⟨ (π₁

                    [π₁

                    ]tm,
                  π₂

                  ⟩

                         ×h Y)) ]tm,

φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
∃h (φ₁
    [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),

     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))

       ]tm])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
φ₃
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
 [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ φ₂

     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩

        [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))),

        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)))

       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))

          ]tm,

       ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (φ₂
            [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))),
              π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)) ⟩
              [⟨ (⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
                  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))
                   ⟩ ]tm)
                 [π₁

                 ]tm,

                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ⟩ ]tm)

                  [π₁

                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                       ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ⟩ ]tm]
            ∧ φ₃
              [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y)),
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Z) ×h Y))) ⟩
                [⟨ (⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X)),
                    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
                    [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Z) ×h Y)))
                       [π₁

                       ]tm,
                     π₂

                     ⟩ ]tm)

                   ]tm,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var
                      ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
φ₃
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ⟩]

  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂

     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ₁

                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((((...) ×h Y) ×h X)
                                  ×h X) ×h Y)))))) ⟩]))

φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
φ₃
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ⟩]
∧ φ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ₂
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ₁
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ ∃h (φ₂
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                        ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩]
            ∧ φ₃
              [⟨ π₂
                   (tm_var
                      (((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                       ×h Y)),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((((...) ×h Y) ×h X)
                                  ×h X) ×h Y)))))) ⟩]))

φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W

⊢ (φ₁
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ ∃h (φ₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                     ×h Y))),
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ φ₃
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((... ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                              ×h Y)))))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z

⊢ (φ₁
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ ∃h (φ₂
         [⟨ π₂

                     ×h Y))),

         ∧ φ₃
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var

            π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((... ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                              ×h Y)))))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X), x ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))), x ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ₂
        [⟨ x
           [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ φ₃
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
           ⟩])

φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ₂
        [⟨ x
           [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ φ₃

             (π₁

                      (tm_var
                         ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
           ⟩])

⊢ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W

z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ₂
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ₃
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
         ⟩])

      ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
 exact y.
             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ (φ₂
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ φ₃
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
      ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X), y ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
  ∧ φ₃
    [⟨ y, π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))))
     ⟩]

                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]

                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]

                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

                      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ∧ φ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ φ₂ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ₁: partial_setoid_morphism W X
φ₂: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
φ₃: partial_setoid_morphism Y Z
w:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X)))): tm (((W ×h Z) ×h Y) ×h X) Z
φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩] ⊢ φ₃ [⟨ y, z ⟩]

                      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory_data
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
is_precategory ?C

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory_data
 exact precategory_data_of_partial_setoids.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
is_precategory precategory_data_of_partial_setoids
 exact precategory_of_partial_setoids_laws.
  Defined.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
category

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
category

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
(λ C : precategory, has_homsets C) ?C

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
precategory
 exact precategory_of_partial_setoids.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
(λ C : precategory, has_homsets C)
  precategory_of_partial_setoids
 abstract
        (intros X Y ;
         exact isaset_partial_setoid_morphism).
  Defined.
End CategoryOfPartialSetoids.
